composition.truck_orientation: facing the camera, slight front-left tilt
composition.important_crop_information: Rear chassis is partially cropped, most of right wheel arch is visible.

company_identity.position: roof light bar, center, above windshield
company_identity.appearance: white uppercase letters, horizontal orientation, flanked by two stylized illustrated figures and Dutch flags

owner_signatures.text_or_element: DUTCH COMMANDER illustrated figures (astronauts/commanders on either side of the roof text)
owner_signatures.position: roof light bar, flanking 'DUTCH COMMANDER' text

grille_lights.position: main lower grille, below MAN emblem

main_headlights.position: integrated into front fascia, left and right sides

front_geometry.grille_description: three broad horizontal bars with large blacked center section hosting the MAN emblem
front_geometry.headlight_description: rectangular multi-element headlamp units set at far left and right edges, with secondary lights and indicators integrated below main cluster
front_geometry.bumper_description: angular modern bumper with chrome or metallic detailing; two outer rectangular auxiliary lights, six round grille lights integrated above splitter
